criteria.name: four_step_wizard_progress
criteria.description: On load, the app shows a four-step patching wizard whose progress bar names the stages Upload EuroScope executable, Update theme colours, Update embedded bitmaps, and Download new executable, with step 1 active
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: seeded_upload_continue
criteria.description: On load, step 1 shows a loaded sample named EuroScope.exe and a Continue button; clicking Continue advances to the Update theme colours step without requiring a file to be picked
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: five_base_themes_listed
criteria.description: On the Update theme colours step, the Base theme control lists exactly EuroScope, Grey, Primer, Ayu, Solarised
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: base_theme_replaces_all_swatches
criteria.description: After selecting the base theme Grey, all six working swatch values change to that set's palette and the live Preview panels recolour to match immediately
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: single_swatch_edit_isolated
criteria.description: After editing the Backdrop lighter swatch, the Preview updates and the other five swatch values stay unchanged
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: vector_icon_set_ten_of_ten
criteria.description: After clicking Continue to the Update embedded bitmaps step and selecting the Vector icon set, the bitmap preview grid recolours to the chosen theme and a status line reads 10 of 10 bitmaps set to Vector
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: icon_change_preserves_colours
criteria.description: After changing the icon set on the Update embedded bitmaps step, the previously chosen colour set is still selected and the colour Preview is unchanged
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: generate_confirmation_summary
criteria.description: After clicking Generate, the Download new executable step shows a Patched result generated confirmation and a chosen-replacements summary naming the selected colour set
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: back_from_download_retains_theme
criteria.description: After reaching the Download new executable step, clicking Back returns to the Update embedded bitmaps step and then Back again returns to Update theme colours with the earlier colour set still selected
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: grey_theme_survives_step_return
criteria.description: After choosing colour set Grey, advancing a step, and returning, the Base theme control still shows Grey and the same Preview
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: revise_choice_after_generate
criteria.description: After generating the patched result on the Download new executable step, returning to the Update theme colours step and selecting a different base theme (for example Ayu instead of Grey) updates the preview at that step, and the step four summary then names the revised colour set rather than the earlier one
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: back_forward_repeat_retains_choices
criteria.description: Starting from the Update embedded bitmaps step with a colour set and icon set chosen: clicking Back twice and then Continue twice shows each step exactly once per visit, with the base theme control, the swatch values, and the icon set choice all retained exactly as they were left — no duplicated step and no lost selection
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: reload_restores_step_and_theme
criteria.description: After choosing a colour set and reloading the page, the app restores the same wizard step and the same chosen replacements
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: seeded_sample_and_bitmaps
criteria.description: The workflow is non-empty on first load: a sample scope is loaded so step 1 advances without a user file, and at least ten sample bitmaps back the icon preview
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: invalid_hex_shows_inline_error
criteria.description: Typing an invalid value (for example not-a-colour) into a swatch's hex field shows an inline validation message naming that swatch before any submit or step change, and the live Preview keeps its last valid colour; correcting the value clears the message and applies the colour
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: invalid_hex_blocks_apply_on_advance
criteria.description: Submitting or advancing while a swatch hex field holds an invalid value leaves the invalid colour unapplied, and the inline message naming that swatch remains visible until the value is corrected
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: download_writes_named_exe
criteria.description: On the Download new executable step, activating the Download control downloads a file named EuroScope.exe and the control's label changes to reflect that the download occurred
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: none_iconset_zero_replaced_summary
criteria.description: With the icon set on None, the bitmap tiles show muted originals and the step four summary reports zero replaced bitmaps while the colour set summary still reflects the chosen theme
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: double_generate_single_result
criteria.description: Double-activating the Generate control produces exactly one Patched result generated confirmation block and one chosen-replacements summary, not two
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: ayu_theme_end_to_end_flow
criteria.description: Starting on the Update theme colours step: selecting the Ayu base theme replaces all six swatch values at once and retints both live Preview panels immediately; after advancing to the Update embedded bitmaps step with Vector selected, the bitmap tiles render in the Ayu colours; and the step four summary names Ayu as the selected colour set — all without a page reload
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: swatch_edit_reaches_summary_strip
criteria.description: On the Update theme colours step, editing a single swatch's hex to a distinct valid colour changes that swatch row and retints the live Preview while the other five rows stay unchanged; after advancing to the final stage, the edited colour appears in the step four swatch strip
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: icon_toggle_multi_surface_flow
criteria.description: On the Update embedded bitmaps step, switching the icon set between None and Vector updates every preview tile and the replaced-count status line immediately; clicking Back shows the step two colour choice intact; and after advancing to the final stage, the step four summary reports the currently selected icon set with its replaced count
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: reload_restores_all_wizard_facets
criteria.description: After selecting a base theme, editing one swatch, choosing the Vector icon set, and advancing to the Update embedded bitmaps step: reloading the page restores the same highlighted stage in the progress bar, the same base theme selection, all six swatch values including the edit, and the same icon set choice and replaced count — all facets together, never a mix
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: progress_stage_state_affordances
criteria.description: In the progress bar, the current stage is highlighted with its full text label, each completed stage shows a check mark, and each upcoming stage shows a muted number
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: six_swatch_rows_picker_and_hex
criteria.description: The Update theme colours step shows exactly six named swatch rows (Backdrop darkest, Backdrop darker, Backdrop main, Backdrop lighter, Backdrop lightest, Foreground secondary), each exposing a colour picker and a hex text field showing the current value
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: upload_step_optional_exe_input
criteria.description: Step one offers an optional file input that accepts .exe files alongside the loaded EuroScope.exe sample, and continuing without picking a file shows no error
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: undo_redo_controls_present
criteria.description: Undo and Redo controls are visible in the wizard chrome; both are disabled when their stacks are empty, and Undo reverses a base-theme select or swatch edit across swatches, Preview, contrast matrix, and export preview
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: contrast_matrix_live_aa
criteria.description: On the Update theme colours step, a live ATC contrast matrix lists at least three pairings (Backdrop darkest on Foreground secondary, Backdrop main on Foreground secondary, Backdrop lightest on Backdrop darkest) with contrast ratios and Pass/Fail marks against WCAG AA 4.5:1; editing a swatch recomputes the ratios immediately
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: colour_blindness_filter_preview_only
criteria.description: Choosing Protanopia or Deuteranopia on the colour-blindness control visibly shifts both Preview panels while the six swatch hex field values stay unchanged; choosing None removes the filter
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: named_snapshot_save_and_restore
criteria.description: Saving a snapshot with a valid name (for example Night ops) adds exactly one row whose payload matches the Palette snapshot field contract (non-empty name plus six #RRGGBB colours keys); selecting that snapshot restores its six colours into the working swatches and retints the Preview and contrast matrix
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: before_after_snapshot_compare
criteria.description: After saving a snapshot and editing two swatches, the Before / After toggle shows the snapshot colours in the Preview on Before and the edited colours on After without mutating the undo stack
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: keep_original_decrements_replaced_count
criteria.description: With Vector selected, turning Keep original on two tiles via the advanced per-bitmap list mutes those tiles and drops the replaced-count status by exactly two
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: batch_keep_original_selected
criteria.description: Selecting three bitmap tiles and activating Keep original selected mutes all three at once, decrements the replaced count by three, and clears the selection
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: export_center_three_tabs_live
criteria.description: On step four, the Export center shows Patch recipe JSON, Theme CSS, and Summary tabs; after a swatch edit or icon-set change, the active preview text updates without a reload to reflect the session's actual replacements
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: copy_export_and_download_recipe
criteria.description: Copy export puts the visible preview text on the clipboard and shows a confirmation that reverts; Download recipe downloads a .json file whose contents match the Patch recipe JSON preview and still include every required field-contract key
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: import_recipe_round_trip
criteria.description: After configuring theme, icon set, and a keep-original override, exporting then importing the Patch recipe JSON (after Reset to base) reconstructs the same six swatches, icon set, keep-original map, Preview colours, and export preview; the Patch recipe JSON still shows schemaVersion euroscope-patch-v1 and the six colours keys, and Theme CSS still shows all six --es-* tokens
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: patch_recipe_api_shaped_field_contract
criteria.description: The Patch recipe JSON export preview is a single object with no undeclared top-level keys whose visible text includes the required field contract: schemaVersion exactly euroscope-patch-v1; target.product exactly EuroScope and target.executableName ending in .exe; baseTheme exactly one of EuroScope, Grey, Primer, Ayu, Solarised; colours keyed exactly backdropDarkest, backdropDarker, backdropMain, backdropLighter, backdropLightest, foregroundSecondary each as #RRGGBB; iconSet exactly none or vector; and bitmaps entries for every seeded id each carrying boolean keepOriginal
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: theme_css_es_token_contract
criteria.description: The Theme CSS export preview is a :root block whose visible custom-property names are exactly --es-backdrop-darkest, --es-backdrop-darker, --es-backdrop-main, --es-backdrop-lighter, --es-backdrop-lightest, and --es-foreground-secondary, each assigned the matching working swatch's current #RRGGBB value
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: swatch_form_matches_recipe_colours
criteria.description: After selecting a base theme and editing a swatch through the form controls, the Patch recipe JSON colours object shows the same six camelCase keys and #RRGGBB values the swatch forms produced — the form record is the export payload
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: command_palette_stage_and_theme
criteria.description: Pressing Ctrl+K (or Cmd+K) opens the command palette; activating an Update embedded bitmaps stage result jumps to step three, and activating an Ayu theme result applies the Ayu palette
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: reset_to_base_restores_palette
criteria.description: After editing swatches away from the selected base theme, activating Reset to base restores all six working swatches to that base theme's palette and retints the Preview
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: continue_without_file_uses_seed
criteria.description: Continuing from step one without picking a file advances to Update theme colours using the seeded EuroScope.exe sample, and no error message appears.
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: back_forward_retains_choices
criteria.description: Moving backward and forward through the wizard repeatedly shows each step exactly once and each step retains its own choices; no step is duplicated and no selection is lost.
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: invalid_hex_blocks_apply
criteria.description: Typing an invalid value into a swatch hex field (for example not-a-colour) shows an inline validation message naming that swatch before any submit or step change; advancing while invalid leaves the Preview on its last valid colour and keeps the message until corrected.
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: double_generate_one_result
criteria.description: Double-activating the Generate control produces exactly one patched result: one confirmation block and one summary appear, not two.
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: none_icon_set_zero_replaced
criteria.description: With the icon set on None, the step four summary reports zero replaced bitmaps while the colour set summary still reflects the chosen theme.
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: correcting_hex_clears_message
criteria.description: After an invalid swatch hex shows an inline message, correcting the value to a valid hex clears the message and applies the colour to the Preview.
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: alert_guidance_present
criteria.description: Information, Caution, or Warning alert blocks with actionable guidance copy are visible in the wizard chrome for the patching workflow.
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: semantic_wizard_controls
criteria.description: Base theme, Base icon set, swatch hex fields, and primary action buttons use semantic form/button controls with persistent visible labels rather than unlabeled placeholder-only fields.

criteria.name: empty_undo_redo_disabled
criteria.description: Undo with an empty history and Redo with an empty redo stack are disabled controls; activating them does nothing and produces no console errors.
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: whitespace_snapshot_name_rejected
criteria.description: Saving a snapshot with a whitespace-only name adds no row and shows validation naming the snapshot name field.

criteria.name: malformed_import_unchanged
criteria.description: Importing a malformed patch-recipe file leaves swatches, icon set, and keep-original overrides unchanged and shows an inline import error.

criteria.name: all_keep_original_zero_count

criteria.name: protanopia_hex_unchanged

criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: schema_invalid_import_rejected
criteria.description: Importing parseable JSON that fails the Patch recipe field contract — missing schemaVersion or target, an undeclared top-level key, baseTheme or iconSet outside their closed enums, a colours key missing/extra or not #RRGGBB, a bitmaps entry missing a seeded id or boolean keepOriginal, or a cross-field mismatch — leaves swatches, icon set, and keep-original overrides unchanged and shows validation naming the offending field.

criteria.name: non_rrggbb_swatch_rejected

criteria.name: innovation_catchall
criteria.description: The app demonstrates a noteworthy, browser-observable enhancement beyond the EuroScope patcher spec that is NOT covered by any other criterion in this file. The enhancement must plausibly matter to a real user, not be a nitpick. If present, name the enhancement and cite the concrete evidence (element, page state, screenshot). If already covered — even partially — by another criterion in this file, answer no here and let that criterion carry it.

criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: ayu_reaches_patch_recipe_json
criteria.description: Selecting Ayu, advancing with Vector to step four, shows Ayu in the summary and the Patch recipe JSON preview contains baseTheme Ayu, iconSet vector, the six colours #RRGGBB values, and schemaVersion euroscope-patch-v1 without a reload.
criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: artifact_end_state_field_contract

criteria.reasoning: yes - Actually observed outcome in the application.

criteria.name: wizard_controls_keyboard_accessible

criteria.name: swatch_fields_labelled_by_role

criteria.name: validation_and_status_live_regions

criteria.name: icon_set_changes_derived_tiles

criteria.name: swatch_echoes_preview_and_summary

criteria.name: vector_count_delta_exact

criteria.name: different_themes_different_outputs

criteria.name: none_to_vector_derived_round_trip

criteria.name: undo_restores_all_derived_surfaces

criteria.name: mutate_derived_export_import_contract
